description: Detailed information can be located at Dev Tool.

fields._selectedAnchor: The point anchor which is part of a gizmo this tool is moving currently.
fields._selectedAnchorHighlight: The slot being used to indicate what gizmo is currently being moved. Is an icosphere.
fields._material: The visual material used for the default cone mesh.
fields._currentGizmo: The gizmo that the dev tool is currently targeting for gizmo options.
fields._previousGizmo: The previous gizmo that the dev tool targeted for gizmo options.
